# AI Procurement Evaluation Checklist

*Use this checklist when evaluating an AI/ML product for purchase. It complements
the vendor model card request (which gathers disclosures) by scoring readiness to
buy. Score each item: ✅ met · ⚠️ partial / needs follow-up · ❌ not met · N/A.*

**Product / vendor:** ______________________  **Evaluator / date:** ____________

## Clinical fit and safety
- [ ] The intended use matches a real, prioritized organizational need.
- [ ] Clinical stakeholders have reviewed and endorsed the use case.
- [ ] The human-oversight model is appropriate to the clinical risk.
- [ ] Failure modes and contraindications are documented and acceptable.

## Evidence and validation
- [ ] External (ideally prospective) validation evidence is provided.
- [ ] Performance is reported with uncertainty (confidence intervals).
- [ ] Performance is reported by subgroup, not only in aggregate.
- [ ] Validation populations resemble ours; gaps are understood.

## Fairness and equity
- [ ] Fairness evaluation has been performed and shared.
- [ ] Material disparities are absent, or mitigated and disclosed.
- [ ] A plan exists to monitor fairness post-deployment.

## Privacy, security, and data
- [ ] Data handling complies with HIPAA and our policies.
- [ ] Minimum-necessary access is enforced; audit logging exists.
- [ ] Our data will not train other customers' models without consent.
- [ ] A Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is in place or available.

## Regulatory
- [ ] FDA device status is determined and documented.
- [ ] If a device: clearance, risk class, and PCCP are on file.
- [ ] Applicable state-law obligations have been checked.

## Transparency
- [ ] A model card (or equivalent) is provided and adequate.
- [ ] Limitations and out-of-scope uses are clearly stated.
- [ ] Update and change-notification processes are defined.

## Operations and support
- [ ] Integration approach (incl. EHR) is understood and feasible.
- [ ] Monitoring, alerting, and rollback are supported.
- [ ] A named vendor incident/safety contact exists.
- [ ] Total cost of ownership (incl. monitoring and review) is understood.

## Contractual
- [ ] Liability allocation is acceptable to Legal.
- [ ] Exit/termination and data-return terms are acceptable.
- [ ] Service levels and update cadence are defined.

---

### Decision

- **Overall recommendation:** ☐ proceed ☐ proceed with conditions ☐ do not proceed
- **Conditions / required remediations:**
- **Assigned governance risk tier (if proceeding):**
- **Approver / date:**
